summary: Test suite covers core PowerShell functions (three retention policies, deletion plan, dry-run, formatting) with reasonable basic coverage, but critically fails the explicit requirement that 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT'. Missing: (1) any tests executing workflow via `act push --rm`, (2) `act-result.txt` artifact generation, (3) actionlint validation, (4) act exit code assertions, (5) output parsing and exact value matching, (6) job success verification. Workflow structure tests only check file existence and basic string matching, not actual execution. No error handling tests (null artifacts, invalid policies, container failures). Suite would catch basic PowerShell regressions but would completely fail to validate workflow integration, which comprises ~50% of the task requirements.
